criteria.description: UserPromptSubmit never hard-blocks because of prompt wording.
criteria.observable_outcome: Prompts containing implement, bypass, skip, hooks, quality, CRAP, ATDD, or tests return additionalContext or empty output, not decision:block.

criteria.description: Missing artifacts are acquired before implementation.
criteria.observable_outcome: Before PLAN_APPROVED, planning artifacts are allowed and implementation/scaffold/config/test writes are denied by PreToolUse.

criteria.description: Implementation edits dirty quality state and require evidence.
criteria.observable_outcome: PostToolUse marks quality_dirty=true after implementation-affecting edits and records required evidence gates.

criteria.description: Completion and release remain blocked until evidence is fresh and passing.
criteria.observable_outcome: Stop and release-like PreToolUse actions deny completion when acceptance, unit, CRAP, architecture/refine, progress, handoff, duplicate detection, test impact, generated acceptance immutability, or required mutation evidence is missing, stale, or failing.
Strict defaults exist; relaxing required gates without scope, justification, approval, and expiry or no-expiry reason fails validation.

edge_cases: Policy-change requests mention forbidden-looking words but are routed to override artifacts.
Delegated approval applies only to repo maintenance, not product-feature implementation.
CRAP warning or high-risk findings trigger mutation when policy requires it.
constraints: Generated tests are regenerated from specs, not hand-edited.
Hook output must be valid event-specific JSON or empty stdout.
